case_title: BIRNBAUM, STEVEN M ESQ. VS WROBEL, THOMAS ESQ.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WROBEL, THOMAS  ESQ.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRNBAUM, STEVEN M    ESQ. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WROBEL, THOMAS  ESQ. $1,820.80 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,872.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
